$description: Chrome and app-shell semantic tokens — headers, tab bars, modals, top bars

chrome-header-bg.$description: App header background (hidden in native-rd, used by web)

screen-header-bg.$description: Redesign screen header band background — theme-authored brand surface

screen-header-fg.$description: Text on the redesign screen header band

screen-header-border.$description: Redesign screen header band bottom border

brand-accent-bg.$description: Brand accent surface for nav and selected chrome; intentionally not neutral accent

chrome-tab-bar-fg.$description: Tab bar inactive text — contrast-computed on purple

chrome-tab-bar-active-fg.$description: Tab bar active/selected text — contrast-computed on purple

chrome-top-bar-fg.$description: Status/top bar text — dark on yellow

celebration-bg.$description: Celebration / payoff surface — brand yellow (Badge Detail hero band). A distinct surface from the purple screen-header chrome; per-theme overrides neutralise it for the ND themes.

celebration-fg.$description: Ink on the celebration surface — title, sparkles, nav icons, and the band/chip border all resolve to this. Dark on yellow.
